name: Nutanix Agentic AI
description: Full-stack software solution for enterprise AI factories. Provides Agentic AI Services, Kubernetes Platform, MCP server support, Advanced AI Gateway, and Models-as-a-Service for building and managing thousands of agents at scale.
capabilities: MCP server integration for tool connectivity
Advanced AI Gateway for policy control
GPU resource optimization via topology-aware scheduling
notes: Launched March 17, 2026. Integrates with NVIDIA AI Enterprise and Agent Toolkit. Supports fine-tuning and NVIDIA Nemotron models. Focus on infrastructure for managing thousands of concurrent agents at enterprise scale.
